name: Dataproces Group A/S
summary: Dataproces Group A/S, an interdisciplinary knowledge company, specializes in IT and consulting services for municipalities and their digital administration. The company offers automation and RPA, revenue optimization, and knowledge and competency solutions. It serves municipalities in the areas of citizen service, social, and employment; children and teenagers; IT and digitization; technology and the environment; and economy and administration. The company was incorporated in 2012 and is based in Nibe, Denmark.
